name: CI and Lint Tooling

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in CI and Lint Tooling is complete and correct

scope: Two related tooling improvements: (1) Wire golangci-lint into the Makefile lint target alongside the existing go vet and gofmt checks -- .golangci.yml config already exists and CI already uses it, so this is just a Makefile gap. (2) Add govulncheck to .github/workflows/ci.yml for automated dependency vulnerability scanning.

breadcrumbs.text: Created 2 leaf children: makefile-lint-integration (wire golangci-lint into Makefile lint target) and ci-govulncheck (add govulncheck job to CI). No ordering dependency between them; both can proceed in parallel.
